prevalence.trend: stable; higher in women and older adults

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant QOL impact and healthcare utilization

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Rome IV criteria; exclude alarm features and secondary causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; improves with diet and laxatives

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Dietary fiber and fluids, osmotic laxatives, stimulant laxatives short-term
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Dietary habits and inconsistent long-term follow-up
